guestBody: Sign in to manage your account, plan, and security preferences.
headerTitle: Personalize the control layer behind your Docipy workspace.
headerBody: Refine your identity, keep an eye on plan health, and tighten account access from one clear surface.
upgradeNotice: Welcome to Pro. Your plan is active. Limits have been updated across the app.
tabProfileDesc: Display name, photo, and learning identity.
tabUsageDesc: Documents, AI limits, and Pro renewal / cancel.
photoHelp: JPEG, PNG, or WebP · max 2 MB for the file you pick. You can drag, zoom, and crop in a circle before it is uploaded. Requires AWS S3 configured on the server (same as document uploads).
urlHelp: Leave empty to clear when you save (or use Remove photo). Disabled while a file is selected.
errImageType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
errImageSize: Image must be 2 MB or smaller.
errAvatarUrl: Avatar URL must be empty or a valid http(s) URL.
proBillingBody: Cancel at the end of your billing period or turn renewal back on under {billingTab}.
proBillingLead: Cancel at the end of your billing period or turn renewal back on under
learningIntro: XP adds up from every lesson step you complete across documents. Every 100 XP raises your level by one.
xpStartShort: Start of level {level}. Earn 100 XP for level {next}.
learningEmpty: Complete a lesson step in any document to start earning XP and unlock achievements.
subTitle: Pro subscription
subCancelUntil: Pro stays active until {date}. It will not renew after that.
subPeriodFallback: the end of the billing period
subStripeNote: Live renewal status loads when Stripe is configured on the server. You can still request cancel or resume below; the server will confirm with Stripe.
subNoDetails: Your account is on Pro. Subscription billing details are not linked for this account.
changePasswordIntro: Separate from the email reset link. Enter your current password, then choose a new one.
errPasswordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
oauthPasswordBody: This account signs in with OAuth and does not have a Docipy password to change here. Continue signing in with your provider ({provider}).
confirmSaveProfileDesc: Your display name and profile photo will be updated.
confirmPasswordDesc: You will use the new password the next time you sign in with email.
confirmCancelSubDesc: You will keep Pro until the end of the current billing period. After that, your plan moves to Free and limits will apply.
confirmLogoutDesc: You will need to sign in again to access your workspace.
